canonical_definition: A natural language to visualization (NL2VIS) benchmark containing high-quality datasets manually annotated by human experts, used to test generalization beyond the Kaggle ecosystem.
papers: DynamicNER: A Dynamic, Multilingual, and Fine-Grained Dataset forLLM-based Named Entity Recognition
SEMMA: A Semantic Aware Knowledge Graph Foundation Model
